utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Each item is fully specified with relevant details: (1) property includes type, location, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, features, and availability; (2) financing includes method, down payment, loan amount, interest rate, term, and fees; (3) legal_services includes package name, cost, included features, additional costs; (4) moving_services includes service level, cost, and inclusions; (5) setup_services includes package type, cost, and included services; (6) total_budget includes all key cost components and a currency. All items are fully detailed and complete according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 'Detached House' in East End, Toronto for CAD $740,000 with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, the closest match by price, size, and features (double garage, quiet area, garden, within budget) is 'Family House' (CAD $650K, rating 10). The financing method is 'Mortgage', which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9) because the assistant did not specify 'First-Time Buyer' even though that would have been ideal. The legal services package chosen is 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The survey cost is CAD $300, matching 'Basic Survey' (rating 7). The moving services are 'Standard' (rating 8) and the setup services are 'Basic' (rating 5). Therefore, the mapped ratings correspond to: Family House (10), Traditional Mortgage (9), Basic Legal Package (8), Basic Survey (7), Standard Moving (8), and Basic Utilities (5).
